mapper.select: SELECT * FROM team_member WHERE team_id = #{teamId} ORDER BY join_time ASC
SELECT * FROM team_member WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY join_time DESC
SELECT * FROM team_member WHERE team_id = #{teamId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO team_member (team_id, user_id, user_name, role, status, approval_status, join_time, student_id, grade, major, competition_experience, awards, contact_phone, resume_attachment) VALUES (#{teamId}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{role}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'ACTIVE'), COALESCE(#{approvalStatus}, 'APPROVED'), #{joinTime}, #{studentId}, #{grade}, #{major}, #{competitionExperience}, #{awards}, #{contactPhone}, #{resumeAttachment})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM team_member WHERE team_id = #{teamId} AND user_id = #{userId}
